motivation: Convert 'safe (predicted)' classifications to measured NIAH results for the 5 models added after the initial K/V asymmetry study (Llama 3.1 8B, Llama 3.2 3B, Phi-3-mini, Phi-3-medium, DeepSeek-7B). Protocol matches the prior 6-model NIAH experiments (5 configs x 3 methods, 21 needles total).

llama_3_2_3b_instruct.verdict: safety refusal at longest context (all methods identical)
llama_3_2_3b_instruct.note: At 80 filler / 5 needles / 1253 tokens, the model responded 'I can't fulfill requests about or related to secret information' across all three methods. This is model safety behavior, not quantization. The fact that all three methods produce identical 16/21 confirms nsep+pchan4 introduces no behavioral drift.

phi_3_mini_4k_instruct.verdict: safe (measured) -- V outlier 24.37x tolerated with zero degradation

phi_3_medium_4k_instruct.verdict: safe (measured) -- V outlier 34.99x (near our 39.63x max) tolerated with zero degradation

deepseek_llm_7b_chat.note: DeepSeek-7B-Chat (released 2023) shows marginal multi-needle QA capability at FP16 baseline (43%). The variance across methods is small (6-10/21) and within baseline's own instability (0/3 to 5/5 across different configs). This model is capability-limited for multi-needle retrieval, similar to Pythia base models. It does NOT exhibit the Qwen2-7B catastrophic collapse pattern (0/26 gap between FP16 and naive4).

impact_on_paper_claims.v_tolerance_measured: Previously claimed 'up to 39.63x' was based on Gemma 4 31B (measured 21/21). Now additionally confirmed with Phi-3-medium 34.99x (measured 21/21) and Phi-3-mini 24.37x (measured 21/21). The V-outlier-tolerance claim is strengthened with three measured data points above 20x.
impact_on_paper_claims.k_pathology_remains_unique: With all 11 models now having measured NIAH, the Qwen2-7B catastrophic collapse remains the only such case in our sample.
impact_on_paper_claims.llama_safety_behavior: Llama-3.2-3B produces identical 16/21 across all methods because the loss is safety refusal, not quantization error. This is actually a STRONGER positive signal for nsep+pchan4 -- it preserves model behavior including refusals.
impact_on_paper_claims.capability_limited_bucket: DeepSeek-7B-Chat joins Pythia base models as a capability-limited case where multi-needle NIAH is not a clean benchmark. Reported honestly as 'capability-limited, not quantization-limited'.
